        "# ==============================\n",
        "# 📌 IMPORT LIBRARIES\n",
        "# ==============================\n",
        "import pandas as pd\n",
        "import numpy as np\n",
        "import matplotlib.pyplot as plt\n",
        "import seaborn as sns\n",
        "\n",
        "from scipy import stats\n",
        "import statsmodels.api as sm\n",
        "\n",
        "# ==============================\n",
        "# 📌 LOAD DATASETS\n",
        "# ==============================\n",
        "sales = pd.read_csv('sales_data (5).csv')\n",
        "churn = pd.read_csv('customer_churn (1).csv')\n",
        "\n",
        "print(\"Sales Data:\")\n",
        "print(sales.head())\n",
        "\n",
        "print(\"\\nChurn Data:\")\n",
        "print(churn.head())\n",
        "\n",
        "# ==============================\n",
        "# 📌 DESCRIPTIVE STATISTICS\n",
        "# ==============================\n",
        "print(\"\\n📊 Descriptive Statistics (Sales):\")\n",
        "print(sales.describe())\n",
        "\n",
        "print(\"\\n📊 Descriptive Statistics (Churn):\")\n",
        "print(churn.describe())\n",
        "\n",
        "# ==============================\n",
        "# 📌 DATA DISTRIBUTION\n",
        "# ==============================\n",
        "plt.figure()\n",
        "sns.histplot(sales.select_dtypes(include=np.number).iloc[:,0], kde=True)\n",
        "plt.title(\"Sales Distribution\")\n",
        "plt.show()\n",
        "\n",
        "# ==============================\n",
        "# 📌 CORRELATION ANALYSIS\n",
        "# ==============================\n",
        "plt.figure()\n",
        "sns.heatmap(sales.select_dtypes(include=np.number).corr(), annot=True, cmap='coolwarm')\n",
        "plt.title(\"Correlation Matrix - Sales\")\n",
        "plt.show()\n",
        "\n",
        "# ==============================\n",
        "# 📌 HYPOTHESIS TESTING (3 TESTS)\n",
        "# ==============================\n",
        "\n",
        "# 1️⃣ T-Test (Example: splitting dataset into 2 halves)\n",
        "half = len(sales)//2\n",
        "group1 = sales.iloc[:half].select_dtypes(include=np.number).iloc[:,0]\n",
        "group2 = sales.iloc[half:].select_dtypes(include=np.number).iloc[:,0]\n",
        "\n",
        "t_stat, p_val = stats.ttest_ind(group1, group2)\n",
        "\n",
        "print(\"\\n🧪 T-Test:\")\n",
        "print(\"T-Statistic:\", t_stat)\n",
        "print(\"P-Value:\", p_val)\n",
        "\n",
        "# 2️⃣ Correlation Test\n",
        "corr, p_corr = stats.pearsonr(\n",
        "    sales.select_dtypes(include=np.number).iloc[:,0],\n",
        "        sales.select_dtypes(include=np.number).iloc[:,1]\n",
        "        )\n",
        "\n",
        "print(\"\\n🧪 Correlation Test:\")\n",
        "print(\"Correlation:\", corr)\n",
        "print(\"P-Value:\", p_corr)\n",
        "\n",
        "# 3️⃣ ANOVA Test (on churn dataset)\n",
        "numeric_cols = churn.select_dtypes(include=np.number).columns\n",
        "\n",
        "if len(numeric_cols) >= 2:\n",
        "    f_stat, p_anova = stats.f_oneway(\n",
        "            churn[numeric_cols[0]],\n",
        "                    churn[numeric_cols[1]]\n",
        "                        )\n",
        "    print(\"\\n🧪 ANOVA Test:\")\n",
        "    print(\"F-Statistic:\", f_stat)\n",
        "    print(\"P-Value:\", p_anova)\n",
        "\n",
        "# ==============================\n",
        "# 📌 CONFIDENCE INTERVAL (95%)\n",
        "# ==============================\n",
        "data = sales.select_dtypes(include=np.number).iloc[:,0]\n",
        "\n",
        "mean = np.mean(data)\n",
        "std_err = stats.sem(data)\n",
        "\n",
        "ci = stats.t.interval(\n",
        "    confidence=0.95,\n",
        "        df=len(data)-1,\n",
        "            loc=mean,\n",
        "                scale=std_err\n",
        "                )\n",
        "\n",
        "print(\"\\n📏 95% Confidence Interval:\")\n",
        "print(ci)\n",
        "\n",
        "# ==============================\n",
        "# 📌 REGRESSION ANALYSIS\n",
        "# ==============================\n",
        "X = sales.select_dtypes(include=np.number).iloc[:, :-1]\n",
        "y = sales.select_dtypes(include=np.number).iloc[:, -1]\n",
        "\n",
        "X = sm.add_constant(X)\n",
        "\n",
        "model = sm.OLS(y, X).fit()\n",
        "\n",
        "print(\"\\n📈 Regression Summary:\")\n",
        "print(model.summary())\n",
        "\n",
        "# ==============================\n",
        "# 📌 FINAL INSIGHTS\n",
        "# ==============================\n",
        "print(\"\\n📊 FINAL INSIGHTS:\")\n",
        "print(f\"Mean Value: {mean}\")\n",
        "print(f\"Confidence Interval: {ci}\")\n",
        "\n",
        "if p_val < 0.05:\n",
        "    print(\"T-Test: Significant difference found\")\n",
        "else:\n",
        "    print(\"T-Test: No significant difference\")\n",
        "\n",
        "if p_corr < 0.05:\n",
        "    print(\"Correlation is significant\")\n",
        "else:\n",
        "    print(\"Correlation is NOT significant\")\n",
        "    print(\"\\n\" + \"=\"*50)\n",
        "    print(\"STATISTICAL ANALYSIS REPORT\")\n",
        "    print(\"=\"*50)\n",
        "\n",
        "    # Clean CI values\n",
        "    lower = float(ci[0])\n",
        "    upper = float(ci[1])\n",
        "\n",
        "    # Margin of error\n",
        "    margin = (upper - lower) / 2\n",
        "\n",
        "    print(f\"Average Value: {mean:.2f} \\u00b1 {margin:.2f} (95% CI)\")\n",
        "\n",
        "    # Correlation interpretation\n",
        "    print(f\"Correlation: {corr:.2f}\")\n",
        "\n",
        "    if p_corr < 0.05:\n",
        "        print(f\"Correlation is SIGNIFICANT (p = {p_corr:.4f})\")\n",
        "    else:\n",
        "        print(f\"Correlation is NOT SIGNIFICANT (p = {p_corr:.4f})\")\n",
        "\n",
        "    # T-Test\n",
        "    if p_val < 0.05:\n",
        "        print(f\"T-Test: Significant difference (p = {p_val:.4f})\")\n",
        "    else:\n",
        "        print(f\"T-Test: No significant difference (p = {p_val:.4f})\")\n",
        "\n",
        "    print(\"=\"*50)"
      ]
    }
  ]
}
